summary: Found that all migration work was already complete in commit abafeb12 (by Claude Opus 4.6, also running against this task). All 4 SQLite stores (EventBuffer, ReconciliationJournal, DurableWriteQueue, WriteJournal) already inherit from AsyncSqliteBase. All callers in main.py and memory_service.py already use .open(). All test files already updated. Discovered that the test_sqlite_migration.py I created during this session was identical to what the Opus agent committed. Discovered and confirmed fix: EventBuffer.open() bypasses WAL setup for :memory: databases. Created test_sqlite_migration.py (31 tests), confirmed all 254 tests pass. Marked all plan steps done (abafeb12).
